content.text:
<timestamp>Monday, Jul 6, 2026, 1:04 PM (UTC+5:30)</timestamp>
<user_query>
Explore this Next.js invoicing app codebase thoroughly to understand the current state of "bank statement reconciliation" and "transaction categorization" features.

I need a comprehensive report on:

1. Where/how bank statements are uploaded/imported (look for routes like app/api/migrations/bank*, any bank statement parser, xls/csv parsing logic, files related to "bank" in app/api, lib/, components/)
2. What the "reconciliation" view/page looks like (find pages/components with "reconcil" in the name, understand the UI and data model)
3. Whether there's any existing transaction categorization logic (rule-based or LLM-based) - search for "categor" in the codebase
4. The database schema for transactions, bank statements, invoices, expenses, categories - look at lib/db, prisma schema, drizzle schema, sql migrations, or supabase migrations - whatever ORM/DB this uses
5. Whether there's any existing LLM/AI integration in the codebase (search for AI SDK usage, OpenAI, Anthropic, any lib/ai-service.ts or similar) that could be reused for categorization
6. Any existing "category" or "category tree" concept in the schema or code
7. How invoices and expenses are created/modeled currently - is there a way transactions link to invoices?
8. Look for any TODO comments, README sections, or planning docs (*.md files) that mention reconciliation, categorization, or bank statement auto-processing plans

For each finding, cite the exact file path and line numbers. Also list out the full folder structure relevant to these features (app/api/migrations, any bank/, reconciliation/, transactions/ folders).

Return a detailed structured report covering all 8 points above with file:line citations so I can understand exactly what's built vs not built.
</user_query>

I'll map the codebase systematically—bank imports, reconciliation UI, categorization, schema, and any AI hooks—starting with targeted searches across those areas.

[REDACTED]

input.description: Mapping bank import, reconciliation, categorization, schema, and AI integration across the codebase.

input.final_summary: Bank reconciliation and categorization are partially built: upload/parsing, rule-based categorization, manual and auto payment matching, and account-summary reporting exist. Gaps include a missing `category_rules` migration, no LLM categorization, no bank↔purchase linking, and unused `ledger_id`.

content.text:
# Bank Reconciliation & Transaction Categorization — Codebase Report

This app uses **Next.js 15 App Router**, **Supabase Postgres** (via `lib/db.ts` `exec_sql` RPC), and **raw SQL** — no Prisma/Drizzle. Canonical types are in `lib/types.ts`; base DDL is in `supabase/schema.sql`.

---

## Relevant folder structure

```
app/
  api/
    bank-statements/upload/route.ts
    bank-transactions/route.ts
    reconcile/route.ts
    categorize/route.ts
    categorize/learn/route.ts
    account-summary/route.ts
    migrations/
      bank-v2/route.ts
      sprint1/route.ts
      sprint2/route.ts
      invoice-items/route.ts
      gst-documents/route.ts
    payments/route.ts
    invoices/route.ts
    invoices/ocr/route.ts
    purchases/route.ts
    chart-of-accounts/route.ts
    notify/digest/route.ts
    init-db/route.ts
    seed-data/route.ts
  dashboard/
    reconciliation/page.tsx
    reconciliation/loading.tsx
    account-summary/page.tsx
    payments/page.tsx
    purchases/page.tsx
    ledger/page.tsx

components/
  bank-statement-upload.tsx
  reconciliation-view.tsx
  category-badge.tsx
  account-summary-view.tsx
  payment-form.tsx
  payment-list.tsx
  purchases-view.tsx

lib/
  parsers/
    types.ts
    csv-bank.ts
    xls-bank.ts
    pdf-bank.ts
    invoice-csv.ts
  categorize.ts
  reconcile-engine.ts
  types.ts
  db.ts

supabase/
  schema.sql
```

There is **no** `app/api/bank/`, `transactions/`, or `reconciliation/` API folder — reconciliation lives at `app/api/reconcile/route.ts`.

---

## 1. Bank statement upload / import

### Primary upload path (built)

| Layer | Path | Role |
|-------|------|------|
| UI | `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/bank-statement-upload.tsx` | Drag/drop upload, calls API, optional auto-reconcile button |
| API | `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/api/bank-statements/upload/route.ts` | Multipart upload, parse, categorize, bulk INSERT |
| Page | `/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/dashboard/reconciliation/page.tsx` | Renders upload + reconciliation view |

**Flow:**

1. **Accepted formats** — CSV, XLS, XLSX, PDF (`bank-statement-upload.tsx` lines 10–16, 56–60; `upload/route.ts` lines 38–43).
2. **Parser dispatch** by extension (`upload/route.ts` lines 49–56):
   - `lib/parsers/csv-bank.ts` — ICICI savings/CC + generic CSV
   - `lib/parsers/xls-bank.ts` — ICICI savings/CC + generic Excel (uses `xlsx`)
   - `lib/parsers/pdf-bank.ts` — ICICI PDF via `pdf-parse` + regex
3. **Shared row shape** — `lib/parsers/types.ts` lines 1–9 (`ParsedBankRow`).
4. **Categorization at import** — rules applied in memory (`upload/route.ts` lines 66–73).
5. **Bulk insert** with dedup `ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING` on `(org_id, transaction_date, description, debit, credit)` (`upload/route.ts` lines 80–90).
6. **Batch tracking** — `upload_batch_id`, `source_format` (`upload/route.ts` lines 67, 85–86).
7. **Auto-reconcile is NOT run on upload** — returns `autoMatched: 0` (`upload/route.ts` line 105). User triggers it separately from the upload component.

### Secondary / legacy import path

- `POST /api/bank-transactions` — JSON array insert with per-row categorization (`app/api/bank-transactions/route.ts` lines 51–75). Older path; upload route is the main one.

### Migrations for bank schema

- `app/api/migrations/bank-v2/route.ts` lines 9–30 — adds `category`, `category_source`, `upload_batch_id`, `source_format`, dedup index.
- `app/api/migrations/sprint1/route.ts` lines 74–86 — adds `financial_year` to `bank_transactions`.
- `app/api/migrations/sprint2/route.ts` lines 56–58 — adds `ledger_id` FK to `chart_of_accounts`.

### Parser details (ICICI-focused)

- **XLS** — auto-detects header row, savings vs credit-card single-amount mode (`xls-bank.ts` lines 24–62, 84–96).
- **CSV** — same logic (`csv-bank.ts` lines 19–53, 67–74).
- **PDF** — regex patterns for ICICI bank/CC lines (`pdf-bank.ts` lines 23–89).

---

## 2. Reconciliation view / page

### Page

`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/dashboard/reconciliation/page.tsx`

- Title: “Bank Reconciliation” (lines 33–34).
- Server-fetches **unreconciled payments** for match dropdown (lines 9–19).
- Renders `BankStatementUpload` then `ReconciliationView` (lines 37–40).

### UI component

`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/reconciliation-view.tsx`

**Layout:**
- Summary cards: unreconciled credits, debits, reconciled counts (lines 122–135).
- Three tabs: **Incoming (Credits)**, **Outgoing (Debits)**, **Reconciled** (lines 113–117, 137–155).
- Paginated transaction list from `GET /api/bank-transactions` (lines 53–74).
- Each row shows description, date, amount, **CategoryBadge**, reference (lines 202–224).
- **Credits/debits tabs:** dropdown to link a **payment** + “Match” button (lines 233–259).
- **Reconciled tab:** “Unmatch” button (lines 263–274).
- Sidebar: unmatched invoice payments on credits tab (lines 297–324).

### Data model for reconciliation

```
bank_transactions.payment_id → payments.id
payments.invoice_id → invoices.id
```

- `bank_transactions.reconciled` boolean (`supabase/schema.sql` lines 120–121).
- `payments.reconciled` boolean (`supabase/schema.sql` lines 105–106).
- Types: `lib/types.ts` lines 83–100 (Payment), 102–121 (BankTransaction).

### API endpoints

| Endpoint | File | Behavior |
|----------|------|----------|
| `GET /api/bank-transactions?type=credits\|debits\|reconciled` | `app/api/bank-transactions/route.ts` lines 8–48 | Paginated lists + counts |
| `POST /api/reconcile?batchId=` | `app/api/reconcile/route.ts` lines 12–16 | Auto-reconcile batch |
| `POST /api/reconcile` body `{transactionId, paymentId}` | `app/api/reconcile/route.ts` lines 19–34 | Manual match |
| `DELETE /api/reconcile` | `app/api/reconcile/route.ts` lines 42–67 | Unmatch |

### Auto-reconciliation engine

`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/lib/reconcile-engine.ts`

**Strategy 1 — Income (credits):** match bank credit to unpaid invoice by amount (±₹1) + date proximity; auto-creates `payments` row and marks invoice `paid` (lines 66–127).

**Strategy 2 — Expense (debits):** CC payment keywords → match unreconciled `payments` record (lines 130–172). Keywords at lines 19–25.

**Not built:** matching debits to `purchases`, direct invoice linking without payments, or purchase/expense auto-creation.

### Upload UI auto-reconcile

`bank-statement-upload.tsx` lines 95–110, 192–204 — after upload, user can click “Auto-reconcile with invoices” calling `POST /api/reconcile?batchId=...`.

### Nav entry

`components/dashboard-layout.tsx` line 21 — “Reconciliation” → `/dashboard/reconciliation`.

### Email digest (related)

`app/api/notify/digest/route.ts` lines 233–260 — emails about stale unreconciled credits/debits with link to reconciliation (line 188).

---

## 3. Transaction categorization logic

### Rule-based engine (built)

`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/lib/categorize.ts`

- Priority-sorted keyword + regex matching (lines 18–61).
- Sources: `"keyword"`, `"regex"`, `"fallback"` → `"Uncategorized"` (lines 18–21, 59–60).
- `fetchRules(orgId)` from `category_rules` table (lines 66–75).
- `learnFromCorrection()` — user corrections add keywords to org rules (lines 81–129).

**Applied at:**
- Upload: `upload/route.ts` lines 66–72.
- Manual JSON import: `bank-transactions/route.ts` lines 56–70.

### API routes

| Route | File | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `POST /api/categorize` | `categorize/route.ts` lines 10–28 | Preview categorize one/many descriptions |
| `GET /api/categorize?org_id=` | `categorize/route.ts` lines 32–54 | List rules grouped by category |
| `POST /api/categorize/learn` | `categorize/learn/route.ts` lines 10–30 | Save user category + learn keyword |

### UI for corrections

`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/components/category-badge.tsx`

- 17 hardcoded flat categories (lines 7–25).
- Click badge → pick category → calls `/api/categorize/learn` (lines 47–64).
- Shows sparkle (auto) vs user icon (lines 75–76).
- Used in reconciliation list (`reconciliation-view.tsx` lines 209–215).

### LLM-based categorization

**Not built.** No AI usage for bank transactions. Categorization is 100% rule-based + user learning.

### Reporting use of categories

- `app/dashboard/account-summary/page.tsx` line 14 — `GROUP BY category` on `bank_transactions`.
- `app/api/account-summary/route.ts` lines 28–40 — same breakdown.
- `components/account-summary-view.tsx` lines 33–37 — pie chart of expense categories.

---

## 4. Database schema

**ORM:** None. Raw SQL via `lib/db.ts` → Supabase `exec_sql` RPC.

### Core tables (`supabase/schema.sql`)

| Table | Lines | Notes |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `invoices` | 69–92 | GST invoice; `status`, amounts, `import_source` |
| `payments` | 95–108 | Links to `invoice_id`, `client_id`; `reconciled` |
| `bank_transactions` | 111–127 | `debit`/`credit`, `reconciled`, `payment_id`, `category`, `category_source`, `upload_batch_id`, `source_format` |
| `purchases` | 147–162 | Input GST / vendor expenses — **separate from bank txns** |
| `invoice_line_items` | 130–144 | Multi-line invoices |
| `chart_of_accounts` | — | **Not in `schema.sql`**; created by `migrations/sprint2` |

### Extended columns (migrations only)

- `bank_transactions.financial_year` — `sprint1/route.ts` lines 75–76.
- `bank_transactions.ledger_id` — `sprint2/route.ts` lines 57–58.
- Dedup unique index — `bank-v2/route.ts` lines 27–29.

### `category_rules` table — **referenced but not defined in repo**

Used in `lib/categorize.ts` (lines 70–72, 107–127) and `app/api/categorize/route.ts` (lines 37–41). **No `CREATE TABLE category_rules` exists** in `schema.sql`, `init-db`, or any migration. Inferred columns from code:

- `id`, `org_id` (nullable), `category`, `keywords` (text[]), `regex_pattern`, `priority`, `is_system`, `updated_at`

**This is a deployment gap** — categorization will fail unless the table was created manually outside the repo.

### No `expenses` table

Expenses are modeled as **`purchases`** (vendor bills with GST), not bank debits.

### TypeScript canonical types

`lib/types.ts` — `Invoice` (36–63), `Payment` (83–100), `BankTransaction` (102–121), `Purchase` (123–141), `ChartOfAccount` (151–163).

---

## 5. LLM / AI integration (reuse potential)

### Existing AI usage

**Only one production AI route:**

`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/app/api/invoices/ocr/route.ts`

- `generateText` from `ai` package (line 2).
- `@ai-sdk/google` → `gemini-2.5-flash` (lines 3, 51).
- Extracts invoice fields from image/PDF (lines 12–41, 90–98).
- Requires `GOOGLE_GENERATIVE_AI_API_KEY` (lines 44–48).

### Installed but unused for bank/categorization

`package.json` lines 12–14, 48 — `@ai-sdk/gateway`, `@ai-sdk/google`, `@ai-sdk/openai`, `ai`.

### No `lib/ai-service.ts`

Does not exist. AI logic is inline in the OCR route only.

### Reuse for categorization

Pattern is established (multipart → `generateText` → JSON parse). Could be adapted for bank descriptions, but **nothing is wired today**.

---

## 6. Category / category tree concepts

### Flat transaction categories (built)

- Stored as `VARCHAR(100)` on `bank_transactions.category` (`schema.sql` lines 122–123).
- Fixed list in UI: `category-badge.tsx` lines 7–27 (17 labels like “Food & Dining”, “GST Payment”, etc.).
- **Not a DB-backed category table** — just strings + rules.

### Chart of accounts tree (partially built, not linked to bank txns)

- `chart_of_accounts` with `parent_id` self-FK (`sprint2/route.ts` lines 15–28).
- Seeded Tally-compatible accounts (`sprint2/route.ts` lines 74–143).
- `bank_transactions.ledger_id` FK exists (`sprint2/route.ts` line 58; `types.ts` line 115) but **no code reads or writes `ledger_id`**.
- UI: `/dashboard/ledger` + `app/api/chart-of-accounts/route.ts`.

**Two parallel category systems exist but are not integrated:**
1. Flat `bank_transactions.category` (rule engine)
2. Hierarchical `chart_of_accounts` (accounting/Tally)

---

## 7. Invoices, expenses, and transaction linking

### Invoices (built)

- Created via `POST /api/invoices` (`invoices/route.ts` lines 30+).
- Also OCR import (`invoices/ocr/route.ts`), CSV import (`invoices/import/route.ts`).
- Status: `unpaid` | `paid` | `partially_paid` | `overdue` (`types.ts` line 56).

### Payments (built)

- `POST /api/payments` — records payment against invoice (`payments/route.ts` lines 33–52).
- UI: `/dashboard/payments/new` + `payment-form.tsx`.
- `reconciled` flag tracks bank match (`payments/route.ts` line 47).

### Expenses / purchases (built, isolated)

- `purchases` table — manual vendor expense entry (`purchases/route.ts` lines 22–51).
- UI: `/dashboard/purchases` — “Log expenses with GST paid to vendors” (`purchases/page.tsx` lines 21–22).
- **No FK from `bank_transactions` to `purchases`.**

### How transactions link to invoices

```
bank_transactions.payment_id → payments.id → payments.invoice_id → invoices.id
```

- Manual reconcile sets `payment_id` (`reconcile/route.ts` lines 22–25).
- Auto-reconcile **creates** a payment then links (`reconcile-engine.ts` lines 97–109).
- **No direct `bank_transactions.invoice_id`.**
- Debits tab copy says “Expenses & Payments” (`reconciliation-view.tsx` line 182) but match UI still only links **payments**, not purchases.

### Invoice status side effects

Auto-reconcile sets invoice `status = 'paid'` (`reconcile-engine.ts` lines 112–115). Manual reconcile does **not** update invoice status (`reconcile/route.ts` lines 22–34).

---

## 8. TODOs, README, planning docs

### README

`/Users/rishikeshjoshi/v0-design-invoicing/README.md`

- Line 16: “Bank Reconciliation — Upload bank statements and match them to payments”.
- Lines 89–90: lists `bank_transactions` table.
- **No** sections on categorization, auto-processing roadmap, or `category_rules`.

### App copy (marketing only)

- `app/page.tsx` lines 30, 64 — mentions reconcile.
- `app/dashboard/page.tsx` line 55 — onboarding step to upload under Reconciliation.

### TODO comments in app code (not reconciliation-specific)

- `app/api/org/invite/route.ts` line 35 — `TODO: send email via Resend`.
- `lib/get-org.ts` line 10 — `TODO (Phase 3 auth): resolve org_id from Stack Auth session`.

### Stale / broken seed route

`app/api/seed-data/route.ts` lines 83–98 — uses old columns (`amount`, `transaction_type`, `is_reconciled`) incompatible with current schema. **Not usable** for testing reconciliation without rewrite.

### No planning docs

No project `.md` files mention categorization plans, bank auto-processing, or reconciliation roadmap (only `README.md` feature table).

---

## Built vs not built — summary

| Area | Status |
|------|--------|
| CSV/XLS/XLSX/PDF bank upload | **Built** |
| ICICI-focused parsers | **Built** |
| Dedup on re-upload | **Built** |
| Rule-based categorization at import | **Built** (if `category_rules` table exists) |
| User category correction + learning | **Built** |
| Manual bank txn ↔ payment matching | **Built** |
| Auto-reconcile credits → invoices | **Built** (opt-in post-upload) |
| Auto-reconcile CC debits → payments | **Built** (keyword-limited) |
| Category breakdown in Account Summary | **Built** |
| `category_rules` migration/seed in repo | **Missing** |
| System default categorization rules | **Missing** (no seed) |
| LLM categorization | **Not built** |
| Bank txn ↔ purchases linking | **Not built** |
| `ledger_id` / chart-of-accounts mapping | **Schema only, unused** |
| Direct bank txn ↔ invoice link | **Not built** (via payments only) |
| Expense auto-creation from debits | **Not built** |
| `lib/ai-service.ts` shared AI layer | **Not built** |
| Reconciliation in email digest | **Built** (`notify/digest`) |

---

## Key file index (quick reference)

| Concern | Path |
|---------|------|
| Upload API | `app/api/bank-statements/upload/route.ts` |
| Parsers | `lib/parsers/{csv,xls,pdf}-bank.ts`, `lib/parsers/types.ts` |
| Categorization engine | `lib/categorize.ts` |
| Categorization APIs | `app/api/categorize/route.ts`, `app/api/categorize/learn/route.ts` |
| Reconciliation UI | `components/reconciliation-view.tsx`, `components/bank-statement-upload.tsx` |
| Reconciliation page | `app/dashboard/reconciliation/page.tsx` |
| Auto-reconcile | `lib/reconcile-engine.ts`, `app/api/reconcile/route.ts` |
| Bank txn list API | `app/api/bank-transactions/route.ts` |
| Schema | `supabase/schema.sql`, `lib/types.ts` |
| Migrations | `app/api/migrations/{bank-v2,sprint1,sprint2}/route.ts` |
| AI (invoice OCR only) | `app/api/invoices/ocr/route.ts` |
| Category UI | `components/category-badge.tsx` |
| Account analytics | `app/dashboard/account-summary/page.tsx`, `app/api/account-summary/route.ts` |

[REDACTED]
